nodeDefs.name: Debug.Print
nodeDefs.title: Print
nodeDefs.desc: Print text for testing graph flow.

nodeDefs.name: Math.AddInt
nodeDefs.title: Add Int
nodeDefs.desc: Simple numeric node for type-link demo.

nodeDefs.name: Flow.FunctionEntry
nodeDefs.title: Function Entry
nodeDefs.desc: Function graph entry; add output pins for parameters (they appear as inputs on Invoke Function nodes).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.FunctionReturn
nodeDefs.title: Return
nodeDefs.desc: Ends the function; add non-exec input pins for return values (they appear as outputs on Invoke Function nodes).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.InvokeFunction
nodeDefs.title: Invoke Function
nodeDefs.desc: Call a user function (set target in Inspector, or drag the function from My Blueprint onto the canvas).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.DispatcherEntry
nodeDefs.title: Dispatcher Entry
nodeDefs.desc: Listener graph entry; add output pins for broadcast payload (same names become Broadcast inputs).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.BroadcastDispatcher
nodeDefs.title: Broadcast Dispatcher
nodeDefs.desc: Broadcast a declared dispatcher from the main or a function graph (set target in Inspector).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.BindDispatcherListener
nodeDefs.title: Bind Dispatcher Listener
nodeDefs.desc: At runtime, register a function as an extra listener for a dispatcher (after static listener graph).

nodeDefs.name: Flow.ClearDispatcherListeners
nodeDefs.title: Clear Dispatcher Listeners
nodeDefs.desc: Clear dynamically bound listeners for a dispatcher (static dispatch_* graph is unchanged).

nodeDefs.name: Engine.GlobalEvent.Emit
nodeDefs.title: Emit Global Event
nodeDefs.desc: Emit a cross-blueprint event (channel + payload from globalEventChannels in blueprint.config.json).

nodeDefs.name: Engine.GlobalEvent.Listen
nodeDefs.title: On Global Event
nodeDefs.desc: Main graph entry for a global channel; payload outputs match the channel manifest.
